name: David Miller
text: The custom neon sign for our cafe exceeded all expectations! The pink glow is vibrant but perfectly clean in photos, which has boosted our Instagram check-ins. Excellent customer support.

name: Sophia Martinez
text: Bought the 'Happily Ever After' sign for our wedding. It was the absolute highlight of the photo booth! Now it hangs beautifully in our bedroom. The dimming controller is perfect.

name: Marcus Vance
text: Superb engineering. The laser-cut acrylic backboard is absolutely flawless, and the LEDs have no hotspots. It feels like an Apple product for signage. Will buy again for our other offices.

name: Laura Thorne
text: The builder UI made designing my sign so fun and accurate. It looks exactly like it did on screen. Delivery was fast and mounting was simple.
